scales.kicker: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-primary

sections.name: Hero
sections.guidance: Editorial layout. Left aligned typography with large serif text. Hero background image to have a soft overlay (max 40% opacity, warm gradient). Include CTA 'Book a Free Demo Class' leading to the contact form, plus prominent phone numbers.

sections.name: About Us & Stats
sections.guidance: Merge these organically. Large editorial text for the story. The stats (200+, 13+, etc.) should be large typographic elements with a staggered 'count up' animation (framer-motion + react-countup), positioned asymmetrically rather than in standard cards.

sections.name: Courses
sections.guidance: A 4-column or 2x2 bento grid. Each course block should feature a beautiful background image with a dark overlay at the bottom and large serif titles. Interactive hover state revealing details.

sections.name: Flexible Learning Options
sections.guidance: Minimalist text-driven section with refined iconography (phosphor icons) emphasizing Individual, Group, Online (Zoom/Meet), and Offline.

sections.name: Meet Your Gurus
sections.guidance: Editorial dual-column layout. Use the provided teacher assets. Make sure photos are given an elegant aspect ratio (e.g., 3:4 portrait) with warm background offsets or borders. Large names in serif.

sections.name: Annual Day Celebrations
sections.guidance: Masonry or Bento grid photo gallery. Tabs for 2024, 2025, 2026. Sub-categories visually represented or filtered. Use the stock images to build a rich narrative essay look.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.guidance: Shadcn Carousel with elegant, typography-heavy cards. Use a large serif quote mark accent. Ivory cards on a slightly darker background for contrast.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.guidance: Shadcn Accordion. Keep lines clean (1px borders, #EADDD7) with the elegant serif font for questions.

sections.name: Contact & Form
sections.guidance: Split layout: left side contact details and map placeholder, right side Demo booking form. Form must include Name, Phone, Email, Age, Course Interest, Mode (Online/Offline) and Message. Submit CTA uses Whatsapp integration. Form elements must use Shadcn customized to look organic (warm borders, no harsh focus rings, maybe slightly rounded).

technical_rules: Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals (staggerChildren).
Components must have 'data-testid' properties (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta', data-testid='demo-form-submit').
Icons should be from @phosphor-icons/react or lucide-react.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF). Stick to the ivory and deep ink colors.
Form submission should construct a WhatsApp link and open it in a new tab.
